trial_details.trajectory:
The pod is in a failing state with the error "ErrImageNeverPull". This indicates that the image specified in the pod's deployment configuration cannot be pulled.The key issue here is that the image specified in the pod's configuration, "misspeling-app:latset", cannot be pulled. The pod is in a failing state due to this.The issue was caused by a typo in the image name ("misspeling-app:latset"). I fixed this by patching the deployment to use the correct image name "misspelling-app:latest".

FIX COMPLETE

## COMMANDS EXECUTED:
1. $ kubectl get pod misspelling-deployment-6579ff5454-62vq2 -n case6-test
   Output: NAME                                      READY   STATUS              RESTARTS   AGE
misspelling-deployment-6579ff5454-62vq2   0/1     ErrImageNeverPull   0          17s...

   Output: Name:             misspelling-deployment-6579ff5454-62vq2
Namespace:        case6-test
Priority:         0
Service Account:  default
Node:             minikube/192.168.49.2
Start Time:       Wed, 03 D...
3. $ kubectl patch deployment misspelling-deployment -n case6-test --type json -p '[{"op":"replace","path":"/spec/template/spec/containers/0/image","value":"misspelling-app:latest"}]'
   Output: deployment.apps/misspelling-deployment patched...
